name: cooldown-planner
description: COOLDOWN//PLANNER — FFXIV raid cooldown planner (Cloudflare Pages + Functions + DO + KV)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n do,pages -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w do-worker" "npm run dev:pages"
scripts.dev:pages: wrangler pages dev --port 8788 --persist-to .wrangler/state -- npm --prefix web run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:worker && npm run build && npm run deploy:pages
